dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal references 'momentum indicator' which is not in the allowed list. Substituted MACD (macd line) as the closest technical proxy for momentum oscillation around zero line, as MACD is a momentum-based indicator that oscillates around zero and is commonly used for mean-reversion strategies in ranging markets. Entry: MACD crosses below zero (establishes short context). Exit: MACD crosses above zero (cover short position).

backtest_rule.reason: Signal references 'momentum indicator' which is not in the allowed list. Substituted MACD (macd line) as the closest technical proxy for momentum oscillation around zero line, as MACD is a momentum-based indicator that oscillates around zero and is commonly used for mean-reversion strategies in ranging markets. Entry: MACD crosses below zero (establishes short context). Exit: MACD crosses above zero (cover short position).

source_rule_text: Cover a short position if the momentum crosses the zero line moving up after penetrating that line moving down.
